query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.establishmentId 
FROM categories c 
JOIN establishments e ON c.establishmentId = e.id 
WHERE e.userId = 180577;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.establishmentId
